name: Dr Yorgos Dedes
title: Senior Lecturer in Turkish
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
expertise_topics: Frontier epics: early Ottoman literature and language (influence of Persian and Greek)
research_interests: Frontier epics: early Ottoman literature and language (influence of Persian and Greek); Balkan (especially Greek) Muslim literature (al Jamiada); early Anatolian Turkish; Ottoman history; Turkish-Greek relations; modern Turkish culture
